heading-xxl.$description: Heading XXL font size on mobile — 39px (one step down from desktop 49px)

heading-xl.$description: Heading XL font size on mobile — 31px (one step down from desktop 39px)

heading-l.$description: Heading L font size on mobile — 25px (one step down from desktop 31px)

heading-m.$description: Heading M font size on mobile — 20px (one step down from desktop 25px)

heading-s.$description: Heading S font size on mobile — 16px (one step down from desktop 20px)

heading-xs.$description: Heading XS font size on mobile — 16px (same as heading-s; minimum heading size)

body-l.$description: Body L font size on mobile — 20px (same as desktop)

body-base.$description: Body base font size on mobile — 16px (same as desktop)

body-s.$description: Body S font size on mobile — 14px (same as desktop)

body-xs.$description: Body XS font size on mobile — 12px (same as desktop)

label-l.$description: Label L font size on mobile — 20px (same as desktop)

label-base.$description: Label base font size on mobile — 16px (same as desktop)

label-s.$description: Label S font size on mobile — 14px (same as desktop)

label-xs.$description: Label XS font size on mobile — 12px (same as desktop)

heading-xxl.$description: Heading XXL line height on mobile — 44px (ratio 1.13)

heading-xl.$description: Heading XL line height on mobile — 36px (ratio 1.16)

heading-l.$description: Heading L line height on mobile — 30px (ratio 1.20)

heading-m.$description: Heading M line height on mobile — 26px (ratio 1.30)

heading-s.$description: Heading S line height on mobile — 22px (ratio 1.38)

heading-xs.$description: Heading XS line height on mobile — 22px (ratio 1.38, same as heading-s)

body-l.$description: Body L line height on mobile — 32px (ratio 1.60, same as desktop)

body-base.$description: Body base line height on mobile — 24px (ratio 1.50, same as desktop)

body-s.$description: Body S line height on mobile — 20px (ratio 1.43, same as desktop)

body-xs.$description: Body XS line height on mobile — 16px (ratio 1.33, same as desktop)

label-l.$description: Label L line height on mobile — 24px (ratio 1.20, same as desktop)

label-base.$description: Label base line height on mobile — 20px (ratio 1.25, same as desktop)

label-s.$description: Label S line height on mobile — 18px (ratio 1.29, same as desktop)

label-xs.$description: Label XS line height on mobile — 16px (ratio 1.33, same as desktop)

label.$description: Medium weight for labels — 500 (differentiates from body at same font size)
Open tracking for labels and small text — 0.4px
